formal_full_experiment_rule: Full claim experiments require zero P1/P2 and project-specific pre-run gates.

projects.bestpaper_ready_reason: Evidence is strong enough for a best-paper-level scoped white-box claim, but final paper wording and paired-delta presentation still need lock-in.
forbidden_claims: provider-general claim outside admitted white-box cells
projects.main_claim_allowed: structured provenance watermark over admitted white-box model cells

overfit_risk.reason: Family/scale breadth, negative controls, ablations, and miss taxonomy reduce overfit risk; residual risk is paper overclaiming.
overfit_risk.required_guard: Keep no-retry and natural-generation boundaries explicit.

remaining_p2: Paper text must foreground that DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B accounts for the row-level positive misses rather than hide it.
Component contribution table should be shown with paired deltas in the main paper or appendix.

attack_negative_control.rationale: 0/48,000 negative hits plus 8 attack conditions provide strong coverage.

baseline_control_strength.rationale: Baseline/control role boundaries are explicit and no support-only cell is promoted.

claim_boundary.rationale: No-retry and provider-general claims are explicitly forbidden.

evidence_workload.rationale: 72,000 white-box records, 10 admitted models, 5 families, all scale buckets, and 43,200 ablation rows.

innovation.rationale: Structured AST/CFG/SSA provenance with keyed schedule and ECC is a real mechanism.

method_rigor.rationale: Fail-closed detector, clean controls, generation-changing ablation, and row-level miss attribution now close the main rigor gap.

reproducibility.rationale: Hash-bound manifests and scripts exist; full rerun remains GPU/model dependent.

statistics.rationale: CI and denominators are present; paper must still show component deltas rather than only gates.

projects.bestpaper_ready_reason: The protocol is clean, but current effect is weak; best-paper case requires v3 sensitivity improvement or an unusually compelling sparse-audit framing.
forbidden_claims: support/public rows as part of the 300-row main denominator

overfit_risk.reason: Frozen threshold discipline is good; the risk is optimizing v3 to the known positives rather than improving protocol invariants.
overfit_risk.required_guard: Freeze v3 thresholds and report all positive-control misses.

remaining_p1: Effect is still too weak for any detection claim: live yield is 6/300 and positive-control sensitivity is 170/300.
A fresh frozen v3 control/live run is required before any claim upgrade beyond conservative null-audit.
remaining_p2: If v3 does not improve sensitivity, the paper must explicitly argue sparse-audit utility rather than detection power.

attack_negative_control.rationale: 0/300 false positives with row hashes is strong.

baseline_control_strength.rationale: Official/control boundaries and support-row exclusions are clean.

claim_boundary.rationale: High-recall, prevalence, and provider-accusation claims are forbidden.

evidence_workload.rationale: 300 live rows plus controls is acceptable for scoped null-audit, not yet best-paper scale/effect.

innovation.rationale: Curator-side null-audit with transcript/hash retention is useful and honestly scoped.

method_rigor.rationale: Positive-control misses now have a row-level taxonomy; effect remains underpowered for detection.

reproducibility.rationale: Raw/structured hash discipline and row manifests are strong; API rerun remains external.

statistics.rationale: CI, threshold discipline, and denominator separation are explicit.

projects.bestpaper_ready_reason: Single-owner claim is strong; best-paper-level generality requires fresh multi-owner live score-vector evidence.
forbidden_claims: multi-owner attribution from input package alone

overfit_risk.reason: Perfect single-owner result can be attacked as owner leakage or shortcut.
overfit_risk.required_guard: Run the 6,000-row multi-owner package and report true/wrong/null/random owner margins separately.

remaining_p1: Broad multi-owner attribution is not claim-bearing until fresh score-vector outputs exist.
Perfect 300/300 result remains vulnerable to shortcut/leakage critique without multi-owner heldout evidence.
remaining_p2: Latency/query frontier should be visible in main text.

attack_negative_control.rationale: 0/1,200 control failures is strong, but owner/task-heldout live outputs are missing.

baseline_control_strength.rationale: Wrong/null/abstain controls exist; multi-owner controls are input-ready but not result-bearing.

claim_boundary.rationale: Scope is correctly single-active-owner/source-bound and DeepSeek-only.

evidence_workload.rationale: 300 APIS, 1,200 controls, 900 transfer rows, and a 6,000-row multi-owner input package.

innovation.rationale: Active-owner attribution with semantic witnesses, decoys, and transfer binding is strong.

method_rigor.rationale: Perfect single-owner results still need multi-owner score vectors to remove leakage/shortcut concerns.

reproducibility.rationale: Receipts and hashes exist; provider rerun and owner secrets remain operational dependencies.

statistics.rationale: CI and task-cluster independence are explicit; rank/AUC awaits multi-owner outputs.

projects.bestpaper_ready_reason: Protocol is honest and useful, but coverage is too low until v5 increases decisive routing without unsafe-pass inflation.
forbidden_claims: visible-marker diagnostic rows as main evidence

overfit_risk.reason: Forcing labels would overfit and inflate unsafe-pass risk; abstention must remain legitimate.
overfit_risk.required_guard: Improve coverage only through preregistered v5 conjunction.

remaining_p1: Decisive coverage is only 81/960; current result is selective triage, not a strong audit classifier.
v5 final evidence is not claim-bearing yet, so coverage cannot be upgraded.
remaining_p2: Expert review support must remain role-based and row-confirmation based.

attack_negative_control.rationale: Unsafe-pass tracking and marker-hidden stress are strong; v5 must be final-row claim-bearing.

baseline_control_strength.rationale: Marker-hidden/visible boundaries and controls are explicit.

claim_boundary.rationale: Safety-certificate and automatic-classifier claims are forbidden.

evidence_workload.rationale: 320 cases and 960 marker-hidden rows are solid.

innovation.rationale: Watermark-as-security-object audit framing is valuable and scoped.

method_rigor.rationale: Explicit abstention is honest, but decisive coverage is low.

reproducibility.rationale: Artifacts and role-based review support exist; final v5 rows remain blocked.

statistics.rationale: Coverage-risk CI and unsafe-pass upper bound are explicit.
